title: hieracium neomarginatum
intro: Hieracium neomarginatum, also known as the spotted hawk's-beard, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). This plant is believed to have medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to act as a diuretic and anti-inflammatory agent. The health benefits of Hieracium neomarginatum include its potential to reduce blood pressure and alleviate symptoms of kidney stones, as well as its antioxidant properties that may help protect against cell damage. Herbal preparations of Hieracium neomarginatum may include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety as a medicinal herb.
